rationale: The skill's primary verb is running Semgrep scans and authoring custom YAML rules, which means reading source files across the project, reading/writing rule YAML and test files, and emitting SARIF/JSON result files. Installation paths spawn pip/brew/docker, and scans invoke the semgrep CLI which fetches rulesets from semgrep.dev (e.g., p/security-audit, auto config). Reference links to semgrep.dev and github.com/semgrep imply network fetches for rule registries and schemas. No deletions are described in the workflow.
